title: Unwieldy
description: The way your hands are formed provide no way of holding a shield upright.
body: ### This mod has been discontinued due to being a maintenance burden and requiring a mixin to loader internals to guarantee that the game doesn't crash upon opening the creative menu. This mod removes all shields from the game including modded shields (with Fabric Shield Lib compat), and by doing this it makes the game more balanced, more inclusive and more fun for veterans of the game. ___
